title: grade_resume_output
description: Output of the grade_resume agent. Exactly these three top-level keys in this order: score, feedback, drops.

feedback.description: Actionable feedback string. May be empty ("") if there is nothing actionable.

drops.description: Items to REMOVE on the next attempt, in priority order (weakest first). MUST be [] unless the user message includes <page_status> indicating the draft is over the page cap. Each item is drawn verbatim from the resume as either an entry label ({role} @ {company}, project {name}, award {title} — {issuer}) or a course name from the Courses/Coursework list.
